description: Composition Purple shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves with double button cuffs, two patch pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps, a full buttoned placket and a curved hem Fit indigo nation Edgy Fit Wash care Hand wash or machine wash cold below 30 degrees using a mild detergent Flat dry in shade Do not wring or bleach Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This impeccably designed shirt from indigo nation remains a timeless classic. Wear this with formal trousers and leather shoes. Model statistics The product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
